    "Plastigauge reading indicates clearance is out of OEM specification",
    "Sequence violation: proceeding with assembly before verifying bearing clearance compliance"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop assembly work immediately",
    "Measure journal diameters and housing bores to determine if the crankshaft or block requires machining",
    "Select and install the correct undersize or oversize bearings to achieve specified oil clearance",
    "Re-verify clearance with Plastigauge before final torque sequence"
  ],
  "rationale": "The Plastigauge reading indicates that the bearing clearances do not meet OEM specifications. Proceeding with engine assembly under these conditions will lead to oil pressure loss or catastrophic bearing failure. The work must be halted to correct the bearing selection or machine the components.",

    "OEM Engine Mechanical Service Manual - Bearing Clearance Specifications"
  ]
